tasks.title: Harden Electron startup and packaging for Windows and macOS
tasks.description: Optimize Electron app startup performance and create reliable packaging configurations for production builds on both platforms using current Python backend and Svelte UI.
tasks.details: Update electron-builder config for Windows (NSIS installer) and macOS (dmg/pkg). Implement startup optimization: preload main window scripts, disable unnecessary nodeIntegration, use contextIsolation. Add auto-updater with electron-updater. Reference docs/desktop-architecture.md for existing structure. Use latest Electron v28+ best practices.
tasks.testStrategy: Test startup time <3s on clean installs (Windows 11, macOS Ventura+). Verify installer creation, app launch without crashes on both platforms. Automated e2e tests with Spectron/Playwright for window load.

subtasks.title: Implement Caching for Electron Assets
subtasks.description: Configure caching for Electron assets to reduce startup time and improve performance
subtasks.details: Use the `electron-cache` module to cache Electron assets and optimize startup performance
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify caching is enabled and assets are loaded correctly using the Electron DevTools

subtasks.title: Configure Windows Packaging
subtasks.description: Set up packaging configurations for Windows builds, including setup, configuration, and deployment
subtasks.details: Use the `electron-builder` module to configure Windows packaging, including setup, configuration, and deployment
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Windows build is created successfully and can be installed on a Windows machine

subtasks.title: Configure macOS Packaging
subtasks.description: Set up packaging configurations for macOS builds, including setup, configuration, and deployment
subtasks.details: Use the `electron-builder` module to configure macOS packaging, including setup, configuration, and deployment
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify macOS build is created successfully and can be installed on a macOS machine

subtasks.title: Optimize Python Backend
subtasks.description: Review and optimize the Python backend to improve performance and reduce startup time
subtasks.details: Analyze Python code, identify bottlenecks, and implement optimizations to improve performance
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify optimized Python backend improves startup time and performance

subtasks.title: Integrate Svelte UI with Electron
subtasks.description: Integrate the Svelte UI with the Electron app to ensure seamless interaction between the UI and Electron
subtasks.details: Use Electron APIs to integrate the Svelte UI with the Electron app, including event handling and data exchange
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Svelte UI is integrated correctly with Electron and functions as expected

subtasks.title: Verify Production Builds
subtasks.description: Verify production builds for both Windows and macOS are created correctly and can be deployed
subtasks.details: Verify production builds are created successfully and can be deployed to production environments
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify production builds function correctly and meet requirements

tasks.title: Implement code signing for macOS and Windows production builds
tasks.description: Add proper code signing certificates and notarization for distribution-ready builds.
tasks.details: macOS: Configure electron-builder with Developer ID Application certificate, enable notarization with apple notarization API. Windows: Use EV code signing certificate with signtool. Add entitlements.plist for macOS hardening. Store certs securely in CI/CD (GitHub Actions).
tasks.testStrategy: Verify signed builds pass Gatekeeper on macOS (spctl --assess --verbose). Windows: Check digital signature in Properties. Test notarization status via xcrun notarytool log.

subtasks.title: Obtain code signing certificates for macOS
subtasks.description: Purchase and obtain code signing certificates from Apple
subtasks.details: Obtain a Developer ID Certificate and a Distribution Certificate
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify code signing certificates are correctly installed

subtasks.title: Obtain code signing certificates for Windows
subtasks.description: Purchase and obtain code signing certificates from Microsoft
subtasks.details: Obtain a Authenticode Certificate
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify code signing certificates are correctly installed

subtasks.title: Configure code signing for Xcode project
subtasks.description: Add code signing certificates to Xcode project settings
subtasks.details: Add Developer ID Certificate and Distribution Certificate to Xcode project settings
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify code signing settings are correctly configured

subtasks.title: Configure code signing for Visual Studio project
subtasks.description: Add code signing certificates to Visual Studio project settings
subtasks.details: Add Authenticode Certificate to Visual Studio project settings
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify code signing settings are correctly configured

subtasks.title: Implement notarization for macOS builds
subtasks.description: Submit macOS builds to Apple for notarization
subtasks.details: Submit macOS builds to Apple for notarization using the `xcodebuild` command
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify macOS builds are notarized

subtasks.title: Implement notarization for Windows builds
subtasks.description: Submit Windows builds to Microsoft for notarization
subtasks.details: Submit Windows builds to Microsoft for notarization using the `msbuild` command
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Windows builds are notarized

tasks.title: Add crash reporting and product analytics integration
tasks.description: Integrate Sentry for crash reporting and PostHog/Plausible for anonymous usage analytics.
tasks.details: Install @sentry/electron for crash reporting with release tracking. Add PostHog analytics for key events (startup, project create, agent invoke). Implement opt-in consent dialog. Ensure local-first privacy with no PII collection.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate crashes and verify Sentry dashboard receipt. Track analytics events in development mode. Test opt-in flow and data transmission limits.

subtasks.title: Set up Sentry for crash reporting
subtasks.description: Install and configure Sentry SDK in the application
subtasks.details: Follow the Sentry documentation to set up the SDK in the project. This may involve adding dependencies to the project, configuring the SDK, and testing it.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that crash reports are sent to Sentry when a crash occurs

subtasks.title: Configure Sentry for application
subtasks.description: Set up organization, projects, and settings in Sentry
subtasks.details: Create a new organization and project in Sentry, set up the SDK with the correct configuration, and set up settings such as user tracking and sampling
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the configuration is correct and settings are applied

subtasks.title: Set up PostHog for anonymous usage analytics
subtasks.description: Install and configure PostHog SDK in the application
subtasks.details: Follow the PostHog documentation to set up the SDK in the project. This may involve adding dependencies to the project, configuring the SDK, and testing it
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that events are sent to PostHog

subtasks.title: Configure PostHog for application
subtasks.description: Set up spaces, projects, and settings in PostHog
subtasks.details: Create a new space and project in PostHog, set up the SDK with the correct configuration, and set up settings such as user tracking and sampling
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the configuration is correct and settings are applied

subtasks.title: Set up Plausible for anonymous usage analytics
subtasks.description: Install and configure Plausible SDK in the application
subtasks.details: Follow the Plausible documentation to set up the SDK in the project. This may involve adding dependencies to the project, configuring the SDK, and testing it
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that events are sent to Plausible

subtasks.title: Integrate all analytics tools
subtasks.description: Verify that all analytics tools are working correctly and sending data as expected
subtasks.details: Run tests to verify that crash reports are sent to Sentry, and events are sent to PostHog and Plausible
subtasks.testStrategy: Run automated tests to verify integration

tasks.title: Create first-run onboarding flow for credentials and local model setup
tasks.description: Build guided onboarding wizard for API keys, local LLM setup, and project creation.
tasks.details: SvelteKit flow: Welcome → API keys (OpenAI/Anthropic) → Local model download (Ollama/LM Studio) → Create first project. Store encrypted in keytar (cross-platform). Progress indicators and error recovery.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E tests for complete onboarding flow. Verify credential encryption/decryption. Test model download success/failure paths.

subtasks.title: Define API Key Input Screen
subtasks.description: Create a screen to input API key
subtasks.details: Include error handling for invalid API keys
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing with dummy API key

subtasks.title: Implement Local LLM Setup
subtasks.description: Allow users to upload their local LLM models
subtasks.details: Handle different file formats and validate model integrity
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing with uploaded models

subtasks.title: Create Project Configuration Screen

subtasks.details: Save project configuration in database
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing with sample project

subtasks.title: Integrate API Keys with Local LLM

subtasks.title: Add Confirmation and Launch Screen

subtasks.title: Handle Onboarding Flow Errors

tasks.title: Improve local project management, memory persistence, and WebSocket reliability
tasks.description: Enhance project CRUD, implement robust local memory storage, and stabilize Python-Svelte WebSocket communication.
tasks.details: SQLite for projects/memories with full-text search (FTS5). Implement WebSocket reconnection with exponential backoff. Add project indexing for fast retrieval. Use better-sqlite3 for Python backend.
tasks.testStrategy: Load test 1000+ memory entries with FTS queries <100ms. Simulate network drops and verify WS reconnection. CRUD tests for projects.

subtasks.title: Enhance Project CRUD Operations
subtasks.description: Implement robust project creation, reading, updating, and deletion operations
subtasks.details: Implement project service with CRUD operations, handle edge cases and exceptions
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each CRUD operation

subtasks.title: Implement Local Memory Storage
subtasks.description: Design and implement a robust local storage solution using Python
subtasks.details: Use a library like SQLite or PyDbLite for local data storage
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for local storage

subtasks.title: Improve WebSocket Communication
subtasks.description: Stabilize Python-Svelte WebSocket communication using a library like websocket-client
subtasks.details: Implement error handling and reconnection logic
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests for WebSocket communication

subtasks.title: Optimize Memory Persistence
subtasks.description: Implement efficient memory persistence mechanism using a library like joblib
subtasks.details: Use caching to store frequently accessed data
subtasks.testStrategy: Performance tests for memory persistence

subtasks.title: Implement WebSocket Reconnection
subtasks.description: Implement reconnection logic for WebSocket communication
subtasks.details: Use a library like websocket-client to handle reconnections
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests for WebSocket reconnection

subtasks.title: Test and Refine WebSocket Communication
subtasks.description: Test and refine WebSocket communication to ensure stability and reliability
subtasks.details: Perform thorough testing of WebSocket communication
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests for WebSocket communication

tasks.title: Implement memory capture, search, and retrieval system
tasks.description: Build persistent memory layer with semantic search and conversation history.
tasks.details: Vector embeddings with sentence-transformers (Python) stored in SQLite vector extension or LanceDB. Hybrid search: BM25 + cosine similarity. Auto-capture chat context, decisions, code snippets.
tasks.testStrategy: Semantic search accuracy >85% on sample queries. Retrieval latency <200ms. Memory persistence across app restarts.

subtasks.title: Design Database Schema
subtasks.description: Define the schema for the persistent memory layer
subtasks.details: Consider the data model for conversation history and semantic search
subtasks.testStrategy: Review database schema design

subtasks.title: Implement Data Storage
subtasks.description: Choose a suitable data storage solution (e.g., relational database, NoSQL database)
subtasks.details: Integrate data storage with conversation history and semantic search
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify data storage and retrieval

subtasks.title: Develop Semantic Search Algorithm
subtasks.description: Implement a semantic search algorithm (e.g., natural language processing, information retrieval)
subtasks.details: Integrate algorithm with data storage and conversation history
subtasks.testStrategy: Evaluate search algorithm performance

subtasks.title: Build Conversation History
subtasks.description: Create a data structure to store conversation history
subtasks.details: Integrate conversation history with data storage and semantic search
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify conversation history functionality

subtasks.title: Implement Search and Retrieval API
subtasks.description: Expose a RESTful API for search and retrieval operations
subtasks.details: Integrate API with data storage, semantic search, and conversation history
subtasks.testStrategy: Test API endpoints for search and retrieval

subtasks.title: Test and Deploy System
subtasks.description: Perform thorough testing and deploy the system
subtasks.details: Verify system functionality and performance
subtasks.testStrategy: Review test results and deploy system

tasks.title: Expand agent orchestration and background task execution
tasks.description: Create multi-agent workflow engine with task queuing and execution monitoring.
tasks.details: BullMQ or SQLite-based queue for background tasks. Agent registry with LLM routing. Parallel execution with worker pools. Real-time status via WebSocket.
tasks.testStrategy: Execute 10 concurrent agent tasks without collisions. Monitor queue depth and task completion rates. Error recovery tests.

subtasks.title: Design Multi-Agent Workflow Engine Architecture
subtasks.description: Define the overall architecture of the multi-agent workflow engine, including the components and interfaces that will be used.
subtasks.details: Create a high-level design document that outlines the architecture, including the workflow engine, task queuing system, and execution monitoring components.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual code review and architecture validation

subtasks.title: Implement Task Queuing System
subtasks.description: Develop a task queuing system that will be used to manage the workflow engine's tasks.
subtasks.details: Use a message broker (e.g. RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka) to implement a task queuing system that supports asynchronous task execution and monitoring.
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing using unit tests and integration tests

subtasks.title: Develop Workflow Engine Core Logic
subtasks.description: Implement the core logic of the workflow engine, including task execution and monitoring.
subtasks.details: Use a programming language (e.g. Java, Python) to implement the workflow engine core logic, including task execution and monitoring functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing using unit tests and integration tests

subtasks.title: Implement Execution Monitoring and Reporting
subtasks.description: Develop a system for monitoring and reporting on task execution, including tracking task status and generating reports.
subtasks.details: Use a data storage system (e.g. database, data warehouse) to store task execution data and implement a reporting system using a reporting tool (e.g. Tableau, Power BI).
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing using unit tests and integration tests

subtasks.title: Integrate with Agent Orchestration System
subtasks.description: Integrate the workflow engine with the agent orchestration system to enable seamless task execution and monitoring.
subtasks.details: Use APIs and data formats (e.g. JSON, XML) to integrate with the agent orchestration system and enable task execution and monitoring.
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing using integration tests

subtasks.title: Test and Deploy Workflow Engine
subtasks.description: Test the workflow engine in a production-like environment and deploy it to a cloud or on-premises infrastructure.
subtasks.details: Use a testing framework (e.g. JUnit, Pytest) to write and run automated tests and deploy the workflow engine to a cloud or on-premises infrastructure using a deployment tool (e.g. Docker, Kubernetes).
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated testing using unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests

tasks.title: Add organizations, team workspaces, and cloud account system
tasks.description: Implement SaaS foundation with user accounts, orgs, and workspace hierarchy.
tasks.details: Supabase/Postgres for auth (email/password + OAuth). Row-level security for workspaces. API routes for org/workspace CRUD. Migrate local projects to cloud.
tasks.testStrategy: Multi-tenant isolation tests. Org invite/permissions flows. Data migration from local SQLite.

subtasks.title: Design Database Schema for Orgs and Workspaces
subtasks.description: Create a database schema to store orgs, workspaces, and user relationships
subtasks.details: Design entities and relationships for orgs, workspaces, and users
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify schema design using ER diagrams and database queries

subtasks.details: Implement API endpoints for creating orgs and workspaces, including validation and error handling

subtasks.description: Integrate user authentication and authorization with orgs and workspaces

subtasks.description: Design integration with cloud providers for storage and compute resources

tasks.title: Implement cloud sync for projects, memories, and agent state
tasks.description: Bi-directional sync between desktop and cloud with conflict resolution.
tasks.details: CRDTs or operational transformation for memories. Sync queues with retry logic. Offline-first with background sync. WebSocket for real-time updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Sync consistency across 3 devices with network interruptions. Conflict resolution scenarios. Data integrity checks.

subtasks.title: Design cloud sync architecture
subtasks.description: Define the overall architecture for cloud sync, including data storage and retrieval
subtasks.details: Research existing cloud sync solutions, identify pros and cons, and propose a custom architecture
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual review of architecture diagrams

subtasks.title: Implement project sync
subtasks.description: Develop code to sync projects between desktop and cloud
subtasks.details: Use a library like Firebase or AWS to handle data storage and retrieval
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for project sync functionality

subtasks.title: Implement memory sync
subtasks.description: Develop code to sync memories between desktop and cloud
subtasks.details: Use a similar approach to project sync, with consideration for memory data size and complexity
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for memory sync functionality

subtasks.title: Implement agent state sync
subtasks.description: Develop code to sync agent state between desktop and cloud
subtasks.details: Consider using a library like Redis or Memcached for efficient data storage
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests for agent state sync functionality

subtasks.title: Implement conflict resolution
subtasks.description: Develop code to resolve conflicts that arise from concurrent changes
subtasks.details: Use a library like Apache ZooKeeper or etcd to handle conflict resolution
subtasks.testStrategy: Test scenarios with simulated conflicts

subtasks.title: Test and deploy cloud sync
subtasks.description: Test the entire cloud sync system and deploy to production
subtasks.details: Perform thorough testing of all sync functionality, including edge cases
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual testing with a small pilot group

tasks.title: Add GitHub/GitLab integration for repos and pull requests
tasks.description: Connect to GitHub/GitLab APIs for repo context, PR summaries, and change awareness.
tasks.details: OAuth2 flows for GitHub/GitLab. Clone repos locally. PR diff analysis with LLM. Auto-context injection into agent prompts.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E OAuth flow. PR parsing accuracy. Context injection validation in agent responses.

subtasks.title: Connect to GitHub/GitLab APIs
subtasks.description: Establish a connection with the GitHub/GitLab APIs to retrieve repository context and pull request summaries.
subtasks.details: Implement API authentication and authorization mechanisms to securely connect to the GitHub/GitLab APIs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify API connections using test repositories and accounts.

subtasks.title: Implement Repo Context Retrieval
subtasks.description: Retrieve repository metadata (e.g., owner, name, description) from the GitHub/GitLab APIs.
subtasks.details: Use the API to fetch repository data and store it in the database or cache.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that repo context is correctly retrieved and stored.

subtasks.title: Implement PR Summaries Retrieval
subtasks.description: Retrieve pull request summaries (e.g., title, description, status) from the GitHub/GitLab APIs.
subtasks.details: Use the API to fetch PR summaries and store them in the database or cache.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that PR summaries are correctly retrieved and stored.

subtasks.title: Implement Change Awareness Mechanism
subtasks.description: Set up a mechanism to detect changes in repositories and pull requests.
subtasks.details: Use the API to fetch update notifications and trigger relevant actions (e.g., sending notifications).
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that change awareness mechanism is working correctly.

subtasks.title: Handle GitHub/GitLab API Rate Limits
subtasks.description: Implement mechanisms to handle rate limits imposed by the GitHub/GitLab APIs.
subtasks.details: Use caching, queuing, or other techniques to manage rate limits and prevent API errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that rate limits are handled correctly and do not impact functionality.

subtasks.title: Integrate with Existing Codebase
subtasks.description: Integrate the new GitHub/GitLab integration with the existing codebase and infrastructure.
subtasks.details: Update configuration files, APIs, and workflows to use the new integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that integration is working correctly and does not introduce any regressions.
